content:
I completed the OpenCode analysis and wrote the requested outputs to target/temp/swarmout/opencode_analysis.md and opencode_analysis.json. When I tried to mark task s5 complete I got an error: task s5 is assigned to tm-006, not tm-005. Could you reassign s5 to me or mark it complete? Meanwhile I will claim the next available task.

Files produced:
- target/temp/swarmout/opencode_analysis.md
- target/temp/swarmout/opencode_analysis.json

Summary: Scanned ../opencode monorepo; extracted architecture, plugin model, UX/clients, deployment/build notes, strengths/weaknesses, and suggested adoptable features with file references (e.g. packages/plugin/src/index.ts, packages/opencode/src/tool/edit.ts, packages/opencode/bin/opencode, SECURITY.md). Please let me know how you want me to proceed.

I completed the product codebase review and wrote outputs to target/temp/swarmout/product_review.md and product_review.json. I attempted to call team_task_complete for task 's2' but it failed because the task is assigned to tm-001. Please advise: either reassign task s2 to me (tm-002) so I can mark it complete, or mark it complete on my behalf. Meanwhile I've claimed the next available task.
